title: Hierarchical Landscape of Optimization Techniques
description: A visual overview categorizing the major areas and methods within modern optimization, showing their foundational relationships and evolutionary trends.
elements: Machine Learning Integration (Neural Networks, Reinforcement Learning)
relationships: Mathematical Foundations form the base for all Deterministic Methods
Limitations of Deterministic Methods led to the development of Stochastic Methods
Machine Learning Integration builds upon and enhances both Deterministic and Stochastic Methods
Emerging Trends represent the current frontier, expanding from all previous categories
